executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Live red is now localized to two owner domains: docs independent signoff is red under an active docs lock, and the marketing owner loop remains fail-closed on stale runner state plus unresolved outcome blockers.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Clear the docs verifier red state and rerun the marketing owner bundle to fresh healthy signoff before any green architecture claim.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Docs independent signoff is live-red again
findings.mechanism: ralph_verifier_latest.md and ralph_verifier_latest.json both show fail; the health monitor rerun could not auto-rerun the docs verifier because another docs loop process currently holds the global lock.
findings.root_cause: The docs owner loop currently owns unresolved public-doc positioning/structure findings and is still holding its own remediation lock.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the active docs owner loop finish or rerun cleanly after lock release, then require fresh docs independent pass before reopening architecture green.

findings.title: Marketing owner loop remains fail-closed on stale runner plus outcome blockers
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_independent_verification.json now flags the runner bundle as stale relative to marketing_momentum_watchdog.json, while momentum stays needs_attention and workflow audit stays needs_repair with flat Codeberg adoption.
findings.root_cause: The marketing owner loop has not yet produced a fresh healthy runner bundle or measurable primary-repo movement.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun the full marketing owner bundle, clear the stale runner condition, and keep the loop red until fresh independent marketing signoff passes.

findings.title: Architecture verifier is correctly fail-closed on live owner-loop blockers
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_independent_verification.json and agent_architecture_verifier_latest.md now fail because docs and marketing signoff are red, not because of topology drift.
findings.root_cause: Independent verification is correctly refusing a green verdict while owner-loop blockers remain active.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the fail-closed path; only expect verifier green after docs and marketing both produce fresh pass artifacts.

findings.title: Persisted disabled cron history remains separate from live topology
findings.mechanism: jobs.json still contains disabled historical entries while the live Gateway scheduler reports 20 enabled jobs and 0 disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Persisted history and live scheduler state are separate surfaces.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue reporting persisted disabled history separately from the live scheduler topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh docs independent pass artifact after the current docs lock clears
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture no longer inherits a red docs verifier state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun the marketing owner bundle to clear stale runner state and re-establish a coherent evidence set
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing independent verification explicitly fails on runner staleness plus unresolved outcome blockers.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Marketing either turns healthy or stays honestly red with fresh evidence.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture independent verification only after docs and marketing evidence are fresh
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current architecture verifier red is a correct downstream consequence, not the root blocker.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture signoff reflects real owner-loop health instead of stale or contradictory evidence.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reran marketing_workflow_audit.py to refresh current bottleneck, repair-window state, and latest executed action evidence.
Reran marketing_momentum_watchdog.py and marketing_loop_independent_verify.py so the live blocker set reflects current runner staleness, momentum, and workflow findings.
Reran health_monitor.py to verify current live cron/artifact state and capture docs plus marketing blocker escalations with fresh timestamps.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification found architecture blockers that prevent a healthy verdict.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh docs independent pass after the active docs lock clears and the current verifier findings are resolved.
Fresh healthy marketing independent signoff after the runner bundle is rerun and outcome blockers are re-evaluated.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Two owner loops are red at once: docs signoff and marketing outcome health
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture can no longer localize the runtime as a marketing-only blocker because the docs verifier is also red while marketing still fails on stale runner state and flat primary-repo outcomes.
